SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar Dec-06-2010 Off Calendar

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-02-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:21am
Judge Pro Tem Michael Lieberman, clerk - Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Kenneth M. Irvin appears in pro per.
Respondent, Tengiz Iosebashvili appears through Irakli Iosebashvili.
Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Lieberman.

10:58am
Matter is submitted.
